Introduction
    Le jardin oublié: La vie et l'oeuvre d'Alice Guy-Blaché is a movie starring Alice Guy, Roberta Blaché, and Adrienne Blaché-Channing. The story of forgotten silent filmmaker Alice Guy and her more than 700 films.
